detail.description:
In Valoria, where magic and nature once thrived, darkness falls as a powerful sorcerer seizes the throne.
Prince Mars, armed with his father’s final gift—a magical helmet—retreats to the forest. 
As shadows grow, can Mars save his people and reclaim his homeland? 
The fate of Valoria rests in your hands.

· BOUNTY NEW PLAYER GIFTS
Come and claim your rewards, no strings attached!
Enjoy 30 guaranteed summons daily, with a total of 7,777 summons!
Also receive a SSR hero, 777 diamonds, and other ra
detail.releaseNotes:
1. Added the [Relic] gameplay, unlocked at level 150.
2. Skeleton King's [Return from the Underworld] skill adjusted: changed from resurrecting after death to directly restoring health upon receiving fatal damage.
3. Adjusted monster attribute modifiers in Main stage, Tower of The Throne, Land of trials, and the Gate of Darkness.
